_comment: Hyperparameters for the type-primary forecast pipeline (predict_2026_types.py / forecast_engine.run_forecast).
_tuning_notes: lam and mu are regularization strengths for the hierarchical poll decomposition model (θ_national and δ_race respectively). Both set to 1.0 pending calibration (Plan C). w_vector_mode controls W vector construction tier in poll_enrichment.py — 'core' uses propensity+state fallback only; 'full' adds method-reach adjustments.
